items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Fork Types
items.description: Core type definitions for Osaka fork: Account, Address, Root, VersionedHash, Bloom, Authorization, encode_account, and EMPTY_ACCOUNT.

items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Requests
items.description: EIP-7685 request framework. Defines deposit, withdrawal, and consolidation request types. Implements extract_deposit_data, parse_deposit_requests, and compute_requests_hash (SHA2-256).
